form.formComment: Turned in a fair debut run over 520m at Q Parklands where he settled off the pace and battled on to finish fifth (30.77) and beaten 12 lengths. Further improved and has the inside draw this time. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Turned in a fair debut run over 520m at Q Parklands where he settled off the pace and battled on to finish fifth (30.77) and beaten 12 lengths. Further improved and has the inside draw this time. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by a nose at Capalaba over 366m (19.79) beating Hara's Tank in Grade 6 on April 15. Can continue his winning ways.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by a nose at Capalaba over 366m (19.79) beating Hara's Tank in Grade 6 on April 15. Can continue his winning ways.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 457m at this track. Others preferred on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 457m at this track. Others preferred on this occasion.

form.formComment: Debutant by Out Of Range from Brockie Magic. From the Robert Cooke kennel. Keep a close eye on the market.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Debutant by Out Of Range from Brockie Magic. From the Robert Cooke kennel. Keep a close eye on the market.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Q Parklands (30.48) in a Grade 6, finishing a 4.5 lengths fourth. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Tough field and looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Q Parklands (30.48) in a Grade 6, finishing a 4.5 lengths fourth. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in his races, Last start finished fourth over 352m at this track, beaten 4 lengths. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in his races, Last start finished fourth over 352m at this track, beaten 4 lengths. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

form.formComment: Showing promise and was a winner three back. Last start missed the frame when a 7 length fourth (25.94) at this track. Rates well on best and expect a better run this time.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (25.79) at big odds over 457m at this track. Has a wide draw to navigate but capable of a better result.
